title: Hot Wheels: Beat That!
summary: Hot Wheels: Beat That! is a racing video game released in September 2007 and based on the Hot Wheels toy line manufactured by Mattel. The game was developed by Eutechnyx and published by Activision.

title: Radical Rides
summary: Radical Rides is a line of cartoonish Bobble Head cars spanning from 1999 to 2001. The line focused on two sports; NASCAR & the NBA. The cars are 1:43 scale with a cartoonish look.

title: 2026 Multi-Pack Exclusives
summary: The following vehicles could only be found in Multi-Packs (3, 8, 10, and 20 Packs) in the year 2026. Toy # goes as the following: 3-packs: K5904, 8-packs: HPV78, 9/10-packs: X6999 & 20-packs: H7045. Some multi-pack exclusive vehicles use existing tampo designs but were released with different colors and wheels, these vehicles are mixed into the contents of the multi-pack.

title: Japanese Classics Series (2023)
summary: The Japanese Classics Series is one of a number of Themed Automotive Assortments for 2023, with five pre-2000 Japanese cars.

title: Grand Prix Series
summary:
250px 
After the 2000 Pro Racing series the Formula Racing castings separated from the Pro Racing line (since the Pro Racing line is more focused on NASCARs) to create its own line, the Grand Prix Series. From 2001- 2005, though the castings represented different car manufacturers, they all are the same casting; GP-2009....
